returns.meetsThreshold: True if the avatar meets the threshold

returns.threshold: The revenue threshold for the tier

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.revenueThreshold: Revenue threshold to unlock (0 for Tier1)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

TIER_THRESHOLDS(uint256).notice: Revenue thresholds for each tier in 18-decimal USD

checkUnlockEligibility(uint256,bytes32).notice: Check if an avatar meets the revenue threshold for a skill

getSkillStatus(uint256,bytes32).notice: Check if a skill is unlocked for an avatar

getTierThreshold(uint8).notice: Get the revenue threshold for a tier

registerSkill(bytes32,uint8,uint256,addr.notice: Register a new skill in the vault

splitter().notice: Reference to DynamicSplitter for revenue checks

unlockSkill(uint256,bytes32).notice: Unlock a skill for an avatar (requires meeting revenue threshold)

unlockedSkillCount(uint256).notice: Count of skills unlocked per avatar
